description_long: This is a classical-style sculpture of a standing human figure, draped in flowing garments reminiscent of Greco-Roman attire. The figure's right arm is bent and holds a fold of the robe, while the left arm is extended slightly outward with the hand relaxed. The facial expression is animated, with the mouth open as if in mid-speech or song, and the hair is styled in loose, wavy locks. The drapery of the clothing is intricately detailed, with deep folds and realistic texture, cascading down to the base. The sculpture stands on a rectangular plinth, and the overall form is solid and monolithic, suggesting it is carved from a single block of stone.
description: A detailed classical sculpture of a standing human figure in flowing robes, with expressive facial features and intricate drapery, mounted on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the expressive face, open mouth, and detailed drapery with the right hand holding the robe and the left arm extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the layered folds of the robe, and the extended left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the draped garment, and the full length of the robe down to the base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, the right hand gripping the robe, and the naturalistic flow of the garment.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
